UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Public profile metadata for the authenticated user

SovereignState.title: Sovereign State
SovereignState.description: Private user configurations, stats, and connected services details

userId.description: The unique user ID matching their authenticated credentials

completedTasksCount.description: Total number of sovereign tasks completed

createdFormsCount.description: Total number of sovereign forms manifested

disobedienceIndex.description: Aggregated user disobedience index representing agency choices

SovereignMission.title: Sovereign Mission
SovereignMission.description: Missions or tasks logged and synced by the user in this app

id.description: The local or Google Task ID

description.description: Detailed goals of this digital sovereignty task

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this mission was logged

/users/{userId}/missions/{missionId}.description: Subcollection storing individual sovereign missions, both synced from Google Tasks and generated by the Genie
